overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime journey through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player character traverses from an elevated pedestrian walkway down through concrete corridors to street level, showcasing the game's distinctive teal and magenta neon aesthetic against wet urban surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overlook with city intersection view

agents.ego_description: standing on elevated walkway overlooking the neon-lit city intersection below

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with purple and pink neon advertisement
multi-lane street crossing with zebra stripes visible below
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Opening view from an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk city intersection at night. Neon billboards and glass skyscrapers dominate the skyline while the street lies empty below, wet from recent rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with teal fluorescent lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway from open elevated platform, lighting shifts to teal fluorescent

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway passing other pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera in white shirt

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure with exposed beams blocking the sky
long fluorescent tubes casting distinctive teal-green illumination
teal-painted safety barrier along the walkway edge
illuminated automated vendors against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway bathed in teal fluorescent light. The camera moves forward past concrete pillars and vending machines while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The city view is replaced by enclosed architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending concrete stairwell connecting walkway levels

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs to lower walkway level

agents.ego_description: navigating down concrete stairs and ramps through the multi-level walkway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with metal railings
thick concrete columns supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The walkway leads into a descending stairwell section with lower ceilings and dimmer lighting. The camera follows the path downward through concrete support pillars, transitioning to lower levels of the urban infrastructure.

events.description: neon light from street exit becomes visible at end of dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through dim corridor toward the bright street exit ahead

entered.detail: bright neon glow marking the exit to the street
close concrete walls in the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: A narrow corridor leads toward the street exit, with the bright neon glow of the city visible at the far end. The enclosed concrete passage creates a stark contrast between the dim interior and the vibrant lights ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with neon storefronts and wet pavement

events.description: exits covered corridor onto city street with traffic and neon signs
white vehicle passes by on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past storefronts and outdoor cafe seating

notable_agents.action: white car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: rain-slicked road surface reflecting neon lights
commercial buildings with bright signage and advertisements
tall building with distinctive red structural columns
tables and umbrellas on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the city street, the scene opens to wet asphalt reflecting vibrant neon storefronts and traffic lights. The camera moves along the sidewalk past outdoor seating and red-trimmed buildings, with vehicles passing by on the glistening road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban vantage point down through a series of enclosed concrete structures to the vibrant city street below. It begins on a high pedestrian walkway overlooking a sprawling intersection of neon billboards and rain-slicked roads before moving into a covered passage bathed in teal fluorescent light. As the camera pushes forward past vending machines and pedestrians, the open skyline is replaced by enclosed architecture that leads into a descending stairwell of dim concrete pillars. The scene then narrows into a dark corridor, creating a stark contrast as the bright glow of the metropolis reappears at the far exit. Finally, the camera emerges onto the street level, where the environment opens up to wet asphalt reflecting vibrant storefronts and passing vehicles.
